items.final_wording: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

source.title: Standard for Well-Child Visits
source.population: Children aged 1 month to 6 years attending well-child visit screening services.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare facilities providing well-child visit screening services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for age-specific well-child screening in Abu Dhabi; partial for children outside the stated age range and for symptom-led growth or developmental presentations. The published copy states an effective date of TBD.

exact_location.heading: 1. Standard Scope; 3.1 History Components; 3.2 Comprehensive Physical Examination

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

items.rationale: Supports child history and comprehensive examination context for poor weight gain in a child; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.

source.title: Standard for Well-Child Visits
source.population: Children aged 1 month to 6 years attending well-child visit screening services.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare facilities providing well-child visit screening services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for age-specific well-child screening in Abu Dhabi; partial for children outside the stated age range and for symptom-led growth or developmental presentations. The published copy states an effective date of TBD.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.

items.rationale: Supports scheduled growth measurement and screening context for poor weight gain in a child; no decision is generated.
